name: nestjs-best-practices
reason: Enforces NestJS module structure, DI patterns, and decorator usage that Cursor would otherwise guess incorrectly.

name: prisma-orm
reason: Knows Prisma schema syntax, relation definitions, and migration commands — prevents raw SQL and ORM substitution.

name: shadcn-ui
reason: Knows exact shadcn component APIs (import paths, prop names) — prevents Cursor from inventing non-existent props.

name: tailwind-v4-shadcn
reason: Ensures Tailwind utility class usage is correct for the version in use; prevents class name guessing.

name: docker-expert
reason: Handles Dockerfile, Compose networking, volume mounts, and healthcheck syntax correctly.

name: postgresql-table-design
reason: Guides index design, constraint naming, and schema decisions when Prisma schema needs optimization.
